mapper.select: SELECT perm_cd, perm_nm, perm_desc, resource_url, http_method, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_permission WHERE perm_cd = #{permCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permission (perm_cd, perm_nm, perm_desc, resource_url, http_method, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{permCd}, #{permNm}, #{permDesc}, #{resourceUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permission SET perm_nm = #{permNm}, perm_desc = #{permDesc}, resource_url = #{resourceUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE perm_cd = #{permCd}
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_permission SET use_yn = 'N', upd_dt = NOW() WHERE perm_cd = #{permCd}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permission WHERE 1=1
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
